title: Leptopus diplospermus
taxonomy: Leptopus diplospermus is classified within the family Daphniphyllaceae. It is a member of the genus Leptopus, which consists of plants found in tropical regions. Leptopus diplospermus is further classified as a species within the family Daphniphyllaceae, placing it within the larger plant kingdom. The classification of Leptopus diplospermus is still being researched and may be subject to change. This species is native to tropical regions and is known for its unique characteristics.
